abstract: A Base64-encoded JSON object which contains a JWS with information describing an offer or switch-plan recommendation.
overview:
## Discussion

This property is a part of the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/advancedCommerceInfo]. For more information on the Advanced Commerce API (ACA), see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI].

See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/sending-advanced-commerce-api-requests-from-your-app] for how to construct this object. Pass the Base64-encoded advancedCommerceRequestData object as a UTF-8 string as [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/advancedCommerceData]. Use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/SubscriptionModifyInAppRequest] with a single [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/SubscriptionModifyChangeItem] provided when constructing the advancedCommerceRequestData.

For more information on the structure of JWS objects, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/generating-jws-to-sign-app-store-requests].

# advancedCommerceData

**Type**

A Base64-encoded JSON object which contains a JWS with information describing an offer or switch-plan recommendation.

## Declaration

```swift
string advancedCommerceData
```

## Discussion

This property is a part of the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/advancedCommerceInfo]. For more information on the Advanced Commerce API (ACA), see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI].

See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/sending-advanced-commerce-api-requests-from-your-app] for how to construct this object. Pass the Base64-encoded advancedCommerceRequestData object as a UTF-8 string as [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/advancedCommerceData]. Use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/SubscriptionModifyInAppRequest] with a single [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/SubscriptionModifyChangeItem] provided when constructing the advancedCommerceRequestData.

For more information on the structure of JWS objects, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/generating-jws-to-sign-app-store-requests].
title: advancedCommerceData
